title: rosa paniculigera
intro: Rosa paniculigera, also known as the White Jasmine Rose or White Perfumed Rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its fragrant flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems. The flowers and leaves of Rosa paniculigera have been used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, Rosa paniculigera is used to treat a range of conditions, including coughs, sore throats, and menstrual cramps.
